primary_businesses: Glossodontics™ (Founder) — dental-airway training system and membership
Cleveland Center for Integrative Dentistry (Lead Clinician) — biological dental practice
primary_linkedin_focus: Aligness™ and Glossodontics™ — 70% Aligness executive positioning, 30% Glossodontics dental education

aligness.business_model: Private physician-led health advisory integrating surgical medicine, functional medicine, and integrative dental medicine into one coordinated strategy for executives. Ongoing advisory relationship — not episodic clinical visits.
aligness.business_stage: Pre-revenue launch (brand formed, LLC registered, landing page in development as of Feb 2026)
aligness.category_creation: Strategic Medical Advisory — a new category that did not previously exist. Not a clinic, not a wellness practice, not an executive physical program. The health equivalent of Goldman Sachs advisory — retained, strategic, coordinated, longitudinal.
aligness.unique_value_proposition: The only executive health advisory that treats the mouth-body connection as a core clinical domain — integrating biological dentistry into the coordination framework alongside surgical medicine and functional medicine.
aligness.vladimir_specific_value_add: Dr. Pastouk is the clinical domain that no other executive health model includes. The systemic inflammation, airway obstruction, and oral microbiome drivers that affect executive performance — brain fog, sleep disruption, cardiovascular risk — are invisible to every other model precisely because no physician or functional medicine practitioner has a dentist in the room.
aligness.competitive_differentiation: Advisory model (ongoing) vs. evaluation model (episodic); dentistry as a core clinical domain (unique); surgeon-level pathology insight + systems medicine + oral-systemic integration; private and confidential.

glossodontics.industry: Dental Continuing Education / Dental Training Platform
glossodontics.business_model: Membership-based training system for dentists. Combines hands-on courses with ongoing membership, case coaching, peer review, and implementation support.
glossodontics.category_definition: Comprehensive dental-airway functional care training — the only training system that teaches dentists to treat the mouth-body connection across airway assessment, functional orthodontics, myofunctional therapy, frenectomy, and case staging.
glossodontics.core_offering: Training program and membership teaching dentists comprehensive dental-airway functional care including: airway assessment, functional orthodontics (ALF, Myobrace, expanders), myofunctional therapy integration, frenectomy (using patented technique), biological surgical protocols, and systematic case staging.
glossodontics.unique_asset: Patented frenectomy technique — the clinical innovation that gives Glossodontics credibility as an original methodology, not a repackaged curriculum.
target_audience_b2b: General dentists seeking to expand into airway and tongue-tie treatment
Biological dentists wanting a systematic training framework
ENT and sleep medicine physicians seeking dental collaboration education
CE event organizers looking for expert speakers on airway and functional dentistry
glossodontics.revenue_model: Membership fees + course enrollment + speaking/training engagements

cleveland_center.positioning: One of the leading biological/metal-free practices in the US — delivering ceramic implants, laser and CT-guided surgery, airway appliances, tongue-tie procedures, biological dental surgery, Invisalign, ozone therapy, and dental acupuncture.
cleveland_center.role_in_linkedin_strategy: Clinical proof platform — the practice provides the real-world validation for Vladimir's thought leadership. Cases, outcomes, and clinical innovation all originate here. LinkedIn content positions the practice as the demonstration of the Glossodontics and Aligness methodologies in action.

brand_assets.visual_identity: Luxury black, gold, and stone neutrals — consistent with Aligness brand. Clinical authority meets executive credibility. Minimalist, premium, not medical-institutional.
brand_assets.brand_personality: The systems dentist: clinically authoritative, intellectually curious, globally credentialed, service-driven. Warm but precise.
brand_assets.co_brand_alignment: All Aligness content should visually and tonally align with Dr. Skeens' brand. Both profiles should be visually recognizable as co-founders of the same premium advisory.

current_challenges: Aligness is a new brand with zero existing digital presence
LinkedIn profile has been passive — not self-managed, low posting cadence, no personal engagement
Both businesses (Glossodontics and Aligness) need to be communicated without confusing the audience
70/30 split (Aligness/Glossodontics) requires careful content architecture to avoid brand blurring
Regulatory constraints on dental advertising limit explicit outcome claims
No content currently available for approval workflow — everything is being created from scratch
short_term_goals: Position Vladimir as a national thought leader in integrative/biological dentistry and executive health
Generate 35-45 qualified patient and advisory inquiries in 90 days
Secure 3-5 speaking/podcast invitations through LinkedIn outreach
Add 400-600 relevant connections (executives, health professionals, dental CE organizers)
Build email list through lead magnets targeting executive pain points
long_term_goals: Establish Glossodontics™ as the definitive training platform for dental-airway functional care
Position Aligness™ as the category leader in executive health advisory
Scale speaking and CE training nationally and internationally
Drive high-quality referral network with ENT, functional medicine, and sleep medicine practitioners
